NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100041094) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $810.06 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUL-16-2018,, (TRANSACTION ID # 100041094) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, WILLIAM M AN INDIVIDUAL $9,570.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,630.00, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S MOTION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT IS GRANTED IN PART. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK IS ENTITLED TO A JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM PEREZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $9,630, INCLUSIVE OF ALL COSTS INCLUDING ALL COSTS CLAIMED ON ITS MEMORANDUM OF COSTS FILED JUNE 28, 2018. PER THE PARTIES' STIPULATION AND MS. DUBOWSKI'S DECLARATION, AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK IS ENTITLED TO THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $12,600 LESS PAYMENTS OF $3,030 TOWARD THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT PLUS COSTS OF $60 CLAIMED ON ITS JUNE 28, 2018 MEMORANDUM OF COSTS THAT WERE NOT ALREADY INCLUDED IN THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Entering Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Alisa J. Kim, Tel. No. 1-510-736-6293 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
William M. Perez, Defendant appearing in proper;

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB's motion for order entering judgment is granted in part. No opposition filed. American Express Bank is entitled to a judgment in its favor and against defendant William Perez in the amount of $9,630, inclusive of all costs including all costs claimed on its memorandum of costs filed June 28, 2018. Per the parties' stipulation and Ms. Dubowski's declaration, American Express Bank is entitled to the settlement amount of $12,600 less payments of $3,030 toward the settlement amount plus costs of $60 claimed on its June 28, 2018 memorandum of costs that were not already included in the settlement amount. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions; Notice Of Submission On Plainitiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ruling: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions; Notice Of Submission On Plainitiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED in its entirety. Sanctions in the amount of $360 are awarded in favor of plaintiff against Defendant William M. Perez. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
